ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "general_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "assistant_general_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the assistant general manager */,
  "home_stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (in feet) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing style of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats by the player in the season */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player in the season */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player in the season */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player in the season */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of RBIs by the player in the season */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player in the season */,
  "average" TEXT /* Batting average of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Manager, Pitching Coach) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the coach */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams coached by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the scout belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the scout (e.g., College Scout, High School Scout) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the scout */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams scouted for by the scout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Trainer, Strength Coach) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the staff member */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams worked for by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Team Doctor, Athletic Trainer) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the staff member */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams worked for by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in the season */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in their division */,
  "league_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the trade occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the trade occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the trade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player traded away by the team */,
  "acquired_from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team from which the player was acquired */,
  "acquired_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player acquired by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_acquired_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquired_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_acquired_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquired_from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the draft occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the draft occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the draft pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player drafted by the team */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round in which the team made the draft pick */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
